title: RequestRefused
description: Published by Dispatch Core when the proposed professional refuses or times out (FSM transition: proposed -> refused). Dispatch Core is expected to loop back and try the next candidate, which is why Evaluation tracks refusal rate per strategy as a key KPI.

pro_id.description: ID of the professional who refused (or failed to respond in time).

reason.description: Why the proposal didn't result in acceptance.

retry_count.description: How many professionals have already been tried for this request_id, including this refusal.
